title: cordula × littleana
intro: Cordula × littleana, also known as Cordyceps sinensis, is a rare and highly valued fungus found in the high-altitude mountain ranges of the world, particularly in China, Nepal, and Tibet. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions, such as cancer, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease. The health benefits of Cordula × littleana include improved immune function, increased energy and endurance, and enhanced cognitive function. Cordula × littleana is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or powder, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine and modern herbal supplements.
